subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Hearken unto the voice of the Manifestation of thy Lord, the One, the Single, Who hath taken unto Himself no companion nor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسد ان استمع ندآء مظهر ربک الواحد الاحد الذی مااتخذ لنفسه صاحبه و لا
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Satan; the Evil One
